block_02: In 2022, we had plenty of mobile updates. If you’ve been searching for new ways to drive traffic, then this letter is the sign that you’ve been waiting for — dive in!
block_04: This is the IQ Broker app, and it’s available for the iOS users from countries where the classic “orange” IQ Option app is unavailable: Mexico, Saudi Arabia, Malaysia, Chile, etc. When trying to download the main app, users will automatically be redirected to the available "black" one.
block_06: We’ve created this landing page in order to increase conversions, especially in geos with weak internet connection. The new landing page’s superpower is that it is short (only 2 screens) and brings the user straight to registration — see for yourself!
block_08: Landing page with mobile registration frame
block_09: On the new landing page, we decided to replace the standard app store download button (that contributes to conversions to install) with a registration form (that boosts conversions to registration). That is, the user has to register an account first, and download the app in the store second. Our experiment showed a significant increase in conversions to registration, so don't hesitate to give it a try.
block_11: Note that all registration frames can now redirect the user to the Traderoom directly from the affiliate page (after registering on the page from the frame).
